benefits.description: absolutely works for libido. Increased sensation that persisted for months after single dose

side_effects.description: potential nausea, mitigated with Zofran pre-medication

protocol_notes: Brand name Vyleesi. Major effects had delayed onset by hours and lasted over 24 hours. Pre-medicated with Zofran to prevent nausea. Months later still experiencing increased sensation. Insurance covers via prior authorization. User has multiple unused boxes.
